channel.title: Tools on 小石头博客
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on 小石头博客

item.title: Vscode搭建c环境
item.description: VsCode搭建C语言的环境 windows平台 1.下载编译器 下载地址 解压设置环境变量 测试 2.下载编辑器 1.vscode安装 2.插件安装 C/C++ Code Runner C/C++ Themes Error Lens 3.配置环境 解决中文乱码 settings.json添加如下配置 "[cpp]": { "files.encoding": "gbk" }, "[c]": { "files.encoding": "gbk" }, 代码调试 代码目录下.vsocde文件新增launch.json launch.json { "version": "0.2.0", "configurations": [ { "name": "C/C++", "type": "cppdbg", "request": "launch", "program": "${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe", "args": [], "stopAtEntry": false, "cwd": "${workspaceFolder}", "environment": [], // "externalConsole": false, //控制是否在vscode中使用系统终端框 "externalConsole": true, "MIMode": "gdb", "miDebuggerPath": "D:/download/x86_64-8.
